prompt:
documentary realism, handheld camera, natural lighting, observational tone.

Office room with wooden desk, metal shelves, and paper stacks; foreground objects remain stable, fine particles shift near surfaces.

neutral indoor light; uneven light wraps across surfaces with falloff at the frame edges.

Light intensity changes slightly across object edges.

Wide framing holds full spatial context and drifts slightly inward.

Frame balance shifts inward with a subtle drift.

wood grain on desk, paper folders, metal shelf frame.

Dust particles are visible in the light beam.

Light flicker appears on the back wall.

Duration: 6 seconds

documentary realism, handheld camera, natural lighting, observational tone.

Desk area with folders, printed documents, and a desktop monitor; object positions remain fixed, small surface elements move.

neutral indoor light; light stays irregular, with dim zones behind foreground objects.

Small object shifts remain visible near the table edge.

Medium framing tracks object relation, reducing space gradually.

Frame compresses gently and maintains object balance.

printed report pages, plastic file tray, keyboard cable.

Loose cable moves slightly near the desk edge.

Small shadow movement appears near the shelf edge.

Duration: 6 seconds

Office room with clear foreground and background separation.

Wood desk, paper stack, shelf labels, and wall clock are visible.

Diffuse daylight spreads through moisture and soft window reflection.

A small hand adjustment appears with restrained body movement.

Medium frame settles with slight inward drift.

Duration: 6 seconds
